AutoRifle.description: Immediate automatic fire with no spin-up, recoil simulation or heat.

BurstRifle.description: Accurate burst weapon; slower cycle but high damage concentrated into each burst.

Spread.description: Multiple projectiles per trigger; high close-range output and deliberate spread.

Precision.description: Slow, powerful long-range shot with strong per-hit value.

FastPrecision.description: Lower per-shot precision weapon with much faster follow-up shots.

Launcher.description: Slow explosive projectile; high impact and area damage.

FastLauncher.description: Rapid smaller explosive projectiles with lower per-shot damage.

ContinuousCone.description: Immediate short-range stream represented as deterministic damage ticks.

ClusterLauncher.description: Primary projectile creates several smaller deterministic explosions.

MineLayer.description: Deploys proximity explosives; strong delayed area control.

Sprayer.description: Rapid close-range chemical stream with persistent corrosion.

Mortar.description: Slow arcing projectile with large persistent damage zone.

Orb.description: Slow large projectile with strong lane-control area damage.

Chain.description: Primary hit chains deterministically to nearby enemies.

Ricochet.description: Hard-light projectile bounces from geometry while retaining damage.

Beam.description: Immediate focused photonic ticks; no heat or charge management.

Drone.description: Deploys a temporary autonomous firing platform; deterministic duration and targeting.

Gravity.description: Charged projectile deals area damage and applies deterministic displacement.

HeavyLMG.description: Immediate enormous automatic damage; no spin-up, heat or recoil system.

AcidPoolCannon.description: Heavy acid shot creates a deadly pool that also heals allies.

OmniPhase.description: Balanced automatic system cycling deterministically through five damage types.
